All settings have sensible defaults — you can start using it with zero configuration."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Environment FTS5 + importance) for recall. These weights are configurable and auto-normalized per query."}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_VEC_TYPE"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"int8"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Vector BEAM benchmark optimizations (OR semantics, larger scans)"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Tiered Degradation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Episodic memories degrade through 3 tiers over time. Tier 1 is full content, Tier 2 is LLM-summarized, Tier 3 is entity-extracted compressed signal."}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],"$L3"]}]}],"$L4"]}],"\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f"],["$L20"],"$L21"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"YX7cMNOpe2LCWmzl4NehX"}

5:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Veracity Weights"}]
6:["$","p",null,{"children":"Memories carry veracity labels that affect their recall weight. These multipliers tune how strongly each veracity level influences retrieval."}]

9:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}]," via fastembed (384 dimensions, local ONNX) for embedding generation. No external API key is needed."]}]

c:["$","p",null,{"children":"The sleep/consolidation cycle can use a local or remote LLM to summarize grouped working memories before promoting them to episodic memory."}]

14:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Auto-Sleep & SHMR"}]
15:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_SLEEP_ENABLED"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"false"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable turns"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SHMR_BATCH_SIZE"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"50"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SHMR batch size for harmony max iterations per cluster"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SHMR_SIMILARITY_THRESHOLD"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.70"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SHMR bank for MCP server"}]]}]]}]]}]
16:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"YAML Configuration"}]
17:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne integrates with the Hermes ",["$","code",null,{"children":"config.yaml"}]," file (not a standalone ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne.yaml"}],"). Configure settings under the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memory.mnemosyne"}]," key:"]}]
18:["$","$L22",null,{"code":"# config.yaml (Hermes project root)\nmemory:\nmnemosyne:\n  # Auto-sleep consolidation\n  auto_sleep: false             # Auto-run sleep() when working memory exceeds threshold\n  sleep_threshold: 50           # Working memory count before auto-sleep triggers\n\n  # Vector configuration\n  vector_type: int8             # Quantization: float32, int8, or bit\n\n  # Pattern filtering\n  ignore_patterns:              # Content patterns to skip during remember()\n    - \"be ACTIVE\"               # Skill refinement boilerplate\n    - \"nothing to change\"       # No-op responses\n    - \"skill.*refined\"          # Wildcard match\n","language":"yaml"}]
19:["$","p",null,{"children":"Config file lookup order (first found wins):"}]
1a:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"./config.yaml"}]," (current working directory)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/mnemosyne/config.yaml"}]," (user-level)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Environment variables (fallback for any setting not in config.yaml)"}],"\n"]}]
1b:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Programmatic Configuration"}]
1c:["$","p",null,{"children":["No config file is needed. You can create a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}]," instance directly in Python:"]}]
1d:["$","$L22",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne(\n  session_id=\"my-agent\",        # Scope working memories to this session\n  db_path=\"./my-memory.db\",     # Custom SQLite database path (optional)\n  bank=\"work\",                  # Named memory bank for isolation\n  author_id=\"alice\",            # Multi-agent identity\n  author_type=\"human\",          # \"human\", \"agent\", or \"system\"\n  channel_id=\"team-slack\",      # Cross-session channel\n)\n","language":"python"}]
1e:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Parameter"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"str"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"\"default\""}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Session identifier for scoping working memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"db_path"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"str | None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Path to the SQLite database file (auto-created if None)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"bank"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"str | None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Named memory bank — each bank gets its own isolated SQLite file under
